---
name: Add an Event
about: Request a new historical event to be added
title: 'Add: '
labels: ['event-addition']
assignees: ''
---

## Event Title

What is the name of the historical event?

## Approximate Date

Year or date range (e.g., 624 CE, 750-754 CE)

## Description

A brief description of the event and why it's significant for Islamic history.

## Location

Where did this event take place? (city, region, modern country)

## Sources

Links to books, articles, or references that document this event.

## Related Events

Any existing events in the timeline that this event connects to.
